headlines.title: Jewish Democrats grapple with a changing party and Israel’s entrenched leadership
headlines.description: Onstage and on the sidelines of the recent Jewish Democratic Council of America Leadership Summit in Washington, prominent pro-Israel Democrats tiptoed into one of the biggest debates roiling their party

headlines.title: Rep. Thomas Massie files paperwork to run in 2028, says he hasn’t made a ‘final decision’ about his political future
headlines.description: Fresh off last week’s primary loss, Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., announced he had filed paperwork for a 2028 run for the House — or something else.

headlines.title: Trump to visit Walter Reed for the third checkup of his second term
headlines.description: President Donald Trump plans to go to Walter Reed National Military Medical Center on Tuesday for a medical and dental checkup, according to a White House official

headlines.title: ‘Emotional’ and ‘humbling’: Veterans in Congress participate in washing of Vietnam Veterans Memorial
headlines.description: Ahead of Memorial Day, a group of veterans serving in Congress cleaned the Vietnam Veterans Memorial wall to honor those killed during the war. NBC’s Melanie Zanona sat down with Rep. Jack Bergman (R-Mich.), Rep. Jim Baird (R-Ind.) and Rep. Maggie Goodlander (D-N.H.) to reflect on their service and the importance of having military veterans serving in Congress.

headlines.title: Trump’s deal to end Iran war appears ‘tilted’ in Tehran’s favor, foreign policy expert
headlines.description: President Trump offers conflicting messages on the status of peace talks with Iran. NBC News correspondents Garrett Haake, Raf Sanchez and Allie Canal discuss the latest diplomatic developments and economic impact. Elise Labott, host of the Cosmopolitics podcast, analyzes the potential deal with Iran.

headlines.title: Trump honors 'those who fell so that our republic might stand' on Memorial Day
headlines.description: President Trump delivered a speech on Memorial Day at Arlington National Cemetery to honor "those who fell so that our republic might stand."

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Iran says no deal ‘imminent’ despite progress in talks with U.S.
headlines.description: Iran warned that an agreement to end the war launched by the U.S. and Israel wasn’t imminent after President Donald Trump raised and then lowered expectations that a deal may be close.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: What we know about the suspect killed and bystander wounded in shooting near the White House
headlines.description: The White House was on lockdown after dozens of gunshots were heard outside Saturday evening.

headlines.title: Trump says he won’t ‘rush’ into a deal with Iran, softening hopes of an imminent agreement
headlines.description: President Donald Trump said he won’t “rush into a deal” to end the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran after senior Republican lawmakers warned it could be a “disastrous mistake.”

headlines.title: Rep. Thomas Massie warns GOP will be ‘very vulnerable’ in the midterms
headlines.description: Rep. Thomas Massie, R-Ky., warned on “Meet the Press” that the Republican Party will be “very vulnerable” during the midterm elections.
